segment.source: Renders an optional eyebrow, heading and subheadline above a responsive grid of cards, each perk combining a semantic icon, title and short rich-text description. Use it for: employee benefits lists on career pages — vacation policy, remote work, health insurance, training budget, pension plans, office extras. Prefer 'Benefit Cards' for customer- or product-facing advantages and 'Company Values' for guiding principles rather than perks.
